title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudocanipes
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudocanipes, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudocanipes include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
